series_metadata.series_description: This file consists of Computer Services, Human Resources, General Services, Equal Opportunity and Administrative Support. Will include all forms of correspondence, resource material and other material relating to the operation of the divisions either generated or received by the office of Communications.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in office one year and then destroy ; Electronic: Retain in operating system for one year and then erase., Paper: Wastepaper ; Electronic: Erase
